About the Tanpura

This tanpura uses actual Miraj-style recordings. The four strings — Pa, Sa, Sa, Sa̱ — create the resonant harmonic bed that sustains through every raga.

How to Use

Choose your root note (Sa), select the string mode, pick the vocal register, then press Begin. The real recording is pitch-shifted to match every key.

About Tabla

Real tabla samples sliced from a live Miraj-style recording. Each bol — Dha, Dhin, Tin, Ta, Na, Ge, Ka — is an actual drum hit. Click the bols above to play them individually.

About the Taals

Teentaal (16), Dadra (6), Jhaptaal (10), Kehrwa (8), Roopak (7), Ektaal (12) and Bhajani (8) cover all major genres from classical to devotional.
